escalation.reason: Breaking change in public API — cannot auto-resolve without human decision.
escalation.blocked_on: Requires architectural review: dependency update changes return types in 3 public endpoints.
attempted: Tried shimming old return types — introduces runtime overhead.
Tried pinning to last safe minor — still vulnerable to CVE.
Tried isolating affected module — breaks integration tests.
escalation.recommendation: Human review needed. Suggest versioning the API (v2) and migrating consumers incrementally.

patterns.what_worked: Detection and impact analysis completed successfully.
patterns.what_was_hard: Every auto-fix path introduces a different regression.
patterns.skill_gap: No guidance for breaking-change CVEs that affect public API surface.
patterns.recurring_pattern: Second escalation this month for public API breaking changes.
